ideation: This sequence aims to depict a clear message of prohibition against littering.  The animation will show both arms extending outward, then moving downward in a sweeping motion as if actively preventing something from being dropped. The final frame will show the arms returning to a neutral position.  The sequence will emphasize a decisive, authoritative movement to communicate the seriousness of the message.

frames.beat: arms push outward, a clear warning sign
arms sweep down, stopping any littering action
arms return to rest, the message is clear
